subject: All your administration in one place?
body:
HelloВ Denys,

В 

Private administration is a hassle for many people and takes up too much time. But with Doccle, you donвЂ™t have to worry about that. In Doccle, you can centralize all your important documents.

В 

To receive those documents in your account, you just need to create a connection with the relevant companies and authorities. Right now, you can already receive documents from: ####AML


 ####AML


 


[ Yes, I want to receive my documents digitally](https://launch.doccle.be/connections "Receive my documents digitally")


Regards,
The Doccle team
